story: Leaping, throwing, and sprinting her way to glory, Jackie Joyner-Kersee amazed the world in 1988. title: Flying Blind: A Daring Aviation Feat

Founding the iconic funk band Tower of Power, known for their horn-driven sound and electrifying performances.
activity_question: What instrument is Emilio Castillo known for playing?
follow_up_question: Can you name another famous saxophone player?

title: A Musical Morphine Maker
story: Mark Sandman, the musical mastermind behind the band Morphine, entered the world on September 24, 1952. Born in Newton, Massachusetts, Sandman would grow up to create a unique sound blending rock and jazz. His deep voice and two-string slide bass became Morphine's trademark, captivating listeners with a style all their own.
activity_question: What instrument was Mark Sandman known for playing?
bonus_fact: Sandman also played in another band called Treat Her Right before forming Morphine.

title: A Pitching Legend's First Pitch
story: The baseball world witnessed a future star's arrival in 1992. Pedro Martínez stepped onto the mound for the Los Angeles Dodgers, facing the Cincinnati Reds on September 24. This marked the beginning of an incredible career for the talented pitcher from the Dominican Republic. Little did anyone know that day would be the start of a journey to baseball greatness.
activity_question: Which team did Pedro Martínez face in his MLB debut?
follow_up_question: What position does a pitcher play in baseball?
